name: Emiliano Salvador
description: Cuban pianist and composer of Afro-Cuban music and Latin jazz

about_quotes.speaker: Paquito D'Rivera
about_quotes.evidence: I did sometimes play with Emiliano Salvador... We used to play in places for free, just to go in and play the compositions together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paquito D'Rivera — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
